scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,admin,h5 -c blue,green,magenta "uv run uvicorn digitalcard.main:app --app-dir backend/src --reload --port 8000" "npm run dev -w @digitalcard/admin" "npm run dev -w @digitalcard/h5"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @digitalcard/admin && npm run build -w @digitalcard/h5
scripts.test: npm run test -w @digitalcard/admin && npm run test -w @digitalcard/h5
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @digitalcard/admin && npm run typecheck -w @digitalcard/h5
